stemHtml: Which option best describes the difference between experienced and inexperienced pilots?

options.a: Flight planning performance decreases with age, and experience is not enough to make up for this deficiency.
options.b: Experienced pilots are less routine-minded than young pilots because they know that routine causes mistakes.
options.c: Inexperienced pilots refer to information more than experts when carrying out the same task.
options.d: Task for task, an experienced pilot’s workload is greater than that of an inexperienced pilot.
